architecture_notes: TreeTraversal stays a facade that applies exclusion policy to live walk facts before returning entries, skips, and recursion intents.

children.name: LiveDirectoryWalk
children.responsibility: Own the combined live directory walk, listing retries, failure scoping, sorted entry facts, and parent-directed child recursion intents.

children.name: ExcludedPathFilter
children.responsibility: Own accepted command-line excludes and built-in excluded entries so hidden paths produce no scan, decision, mutation, or snapshot eligibility.
